headline: Ventas Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.52 Per Common Share
summary: Ventas, Inc. today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.52 per common share. The dividend will be payable in cash on July 16, 2026, to stockholders of record...
